items.title: How a ‘Wrong Number’ message turned into a $3.4M crypto scam
items.summary: A simple “wrong number” message led to a $3.4 million crypto scam, exposing social engineering tactics, fake investments and fund laundering methods.

items.title: Polymarket traders bet on Iran ceasefire even as oil shock concerns persist
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for March 23, 2026

items.title: Bitcoin’s battle for $70K continues as data shows traders avoiding bullish positioning
items.summary: Rising inflation concerns weigh on Bitcoin’s breakout as traders refuse to take on bullish positions, despite Monday’s 4% price bounce.

items.title: Senator Warren questions whether MrBeast will market crypto to kids
items.summary: A letter to the influencer and the CEO of his holding company expressed concerns about whether the two will allow minors to trade crypto through a recently acquired banking app.

items.title: Polymarket tightens rules to curb manipulation, insider trading risks
items.summary: Polymarket introduced stricter trading safeguards and market limits as it responds to concerns over manipulation, insider trading and market fairness.

items.title: Siren token surges 340% in 7 days, draws scrutiny over concentrated supply
items.summary: Arkham data shows a wallet cluster holding 644 million SIREN, about 88% of the 728 million circulating supply, raising manipulation concerns.

items.title: Balancer Labs will shut down as corporate entity became 'a liability' after $110 million exploit
items.summary: Co-founder Fernando Martinelli said he considered winding down the entire protocol but decided the team deserved a chance to restructure, with the DAO targeting zero emissions, fee restructuring, and a BAL buyback to offer holders a fair exit.

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana prices move higher as Gulf allies inch toward joining Iran war
items.summary: Crypto recovered on Tuesday morning even as Monday's relief rally unraveled across traditional markets, with oil jumping 4% on reports that Saudi Arabia and the UAE are moving to join the conflict.

items.title: Bitcoin's mining concentration just showed up in a rare 2-block reorg
items.summary: A 2-block reorg at height 941,881 saw Foundry's chain overwrite blocks from AntPool and ViaBTC, coming days after mining difficulty dropped nearly 8%.

items.title: SEC’s top enforcer clashed over Trump cases before quitting: Report
items.summary: The SEC’s handling of cases involving Justin Sun and Elon Musk was among the factors that caused the agency’s top enforcement official to quit, according to sources.

items.title: Major Australian pension fund mulls crypto offerings amid growing demand
items.summary: Hostplus is the third-largest super fund in Australia by members, with 2.2 million, and the fifth-largest by assets under management, with over $139 billion in assets.

items.title: Circle asks EU to ease crypto thresholds in proposed markets framework
items.summary: Circle said no euro-denominated "e-money token," including its EURC stablecoin, has reached the framework's proposed market cap threshold for use in settlement.

items.title: TRON DAO expands AI fund to $1B as agentic economy race heats up
items.summary: The $1 billion AI fund targets investments in stablecoin rails, agent identity, tokenized RWAs and developer tooling for autonomous AI systems.

items.title: Delaware to regulate stablecoins under banking framework in new bill
items.summary: The stablecoin bill introduced in Delaware aims to create a licensing framework for stablecoin issuers as part of the state's first major banking code update since 1981.

items.title: Bitmine chair sees ‘mini-crypto winter’ thaw for ETH as it hits 77% of goal
items.summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies bought another $139 million in Ether last week, bringing its ETH holdings to 4.6 million.

items.title: Balancer Labs shuts down 4 months after $100M+ exploit, protocol to continue
items.summary: Executives at Balancer Labs are now pushing for the protocol to be managed by the Balancer Foundation and Balancer’s DAO.

items.title: Kalshi joins Polymarket in sweeping user bans to head off insider trading
items.summary: Kalshi and Polymarket have moved to restrict insider trading on the same day lawmakers introduced a bipartisan bill to ban popular sports event contracts.

items.title: Eyecare biotech jumps 19% after stablecoin-focused rebrand
items.summary: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals was founded in 2000 as a biopharmaceutical company developing eye care products and is now betting big on the Sky protocol and stablecoins.

items.title: Strategy shares $44.1B plan to buy more Bitcoin amid market downturn
items.summary: Strategy is increasingly turning to perpetual preferred stocks to fund its Bitcoin strategy, with the company adding 90,000 BTC to its balance sheet so far this year.

items.title: Stablecoin yield in crypto Clarity Act won't allow rewards on balances, latest text says
items.summary: The crypto industry got a first look at legislative language that won't allow rewards on stablecoin balances, and the approach is seen as restrictive.
